meta.title: Pre-Built Authentication | SassyPack SaaS Starter Kit
meta.description: Skip weeks of auth setup. JWT authentication, user management, password reset, email verification built into SassyPack. Production-ready in hours.

hero.subheading: Skip the complexity of building secure authentication from scratch.

problem.heading: The Problem
problem.description: Building authentication takes 2-3 weeks. You need JWT tokens, refresh logic, password hashing, email verification, session management, and security audits. One mistake and your users are at risk.

solution.heading: How SassyPack Solves It
points: JWT-based authentication with refresh tokens out of the box
Secure password hashing with bcrypt
Email verification and password reset flows
Role-based access control (RBAC) for admin and user roles
Session management with automatic token refresh
Security best practices: rate limiting, CORS, helmet.js

technicalDetails.heading: Technical Implementation
Nextjs: MongoDB user schema with encrypted passwords

meta.title: Pre-Built Payment Integration | SassyPack SaaS Starter Kit
meta.description: Stripe and PayPal integration built-in. Subscription billing, webhooks, and payment flows ready to go. Launch paid SaaS in hours.

hero.subheading: Accept payments and manage subscriptions from day one.

problem.heading: The Problem
problem.description: Payment integration is complex. Stripe docs are 1000+ pages. You need checkout flows, subscription management, webhook handling, failed payment recovery, and invoice generation. Most founders spend 2-4 weeks on payments alone.

solution.heading: How SassyPack Solves It
points: Stripe Checkout integration with one-time and recurring payments
PayPal alternative for broader payment options
Webhook handlers for subscription events (created, canceled, failed)
Automatic invoice generation and email delivery
Failed payment retry logic
Customer portal for subscription management

technicalDetails.heading: Technical Implementation
Nextjs: Express webhook endpoints with signature verification
MongoDB subscription schema synced with Stripe
Payment status tracking and user gating
nextjs: API routes for Stripe Checkout sessions

meta.title: Pre-Built SaaS Dashboards | SassyPack Starter Kit
meta.description: Admin and user dashboards with charts, tables, and analytics. Responsive, accessible, production-ready. Built with React and Tailwind CSS.

hero.subheading: Beautiful, functional dashboards for admins and users.

problem.heading: The Problem
problem.description: Building dashboards from scratch takes weeks. You need responsive layouts, charts, tables, filters, real-time data, and mobile support. Design and UX decisions slow you down.

solution.heading: How SassyPack Solves It
points: Admin dashboard with user management, analytics, and revenue tracking
User dashboard with account settings, usage stats, and billing
Interactive charts (line, bar, pie) with Chart.js / Recharts
Data tables with sorting, filtering, and pagination
Responsive design for mobile, tablet, and desktop
Dark mode support built-in

technicalDetails.heading: Technical Implementation
Nextjs: React components with hooks for data fetching
nextjs: Server components for fast initial load

meta.title: Production-Ready API Structure | SassyPack Starter Kit
meta.description: RESTful API with middleware, error handling, validation, and documentation. Built for scalability and security. Nextjs and Next.js supported.

hero.subheading: Production-ready REST API with best practices baked in.

problem.heading: The Problem
problem.description: Setting up a scalable API requires planning. You need route organization, middleware, validation, error handling, rate limiting, and documentation. Poor structure leads to technical debt.

solution.heading: How SassyPack Solves It
points: RESTful API with clear endpoint naming conventions
Middleware for authentication, validation, and error handling
Request validation with Joi / Zod
Centralized error handling with custom error classes
Rate limiting to prevent abuse
API documentation with Swagger / OpenAPI

technicalDetails.heading: Technical Implementation
Nextjs: Express router with modular route files

meta.title: User Management System | SassyPack Starter Kit
meta.description: Complete user management with roles, permissions, invitations, and team features. Admin controls built-in.

hero.subheading: Manage users, roles, and permissions with ease.

problem.heading: The Problem
problem.description: User management is more than just login. You need roles, permissions, team invitations, user deactivation, and admin controls. Building this takes weeks.

solution.heading: How SassyPack Solves It
points: Role-based access control (admin, user, team member)
User invitation system with email confirmations
Team management with member roles
User profile editing and account settings
Admin panel for user management (view, edit, deactivate)
Activity logs and audit trails

technicalDetails.heading: Technical Implementation
nextjs: Prisma relations for users and teams

meta.title: Built-In Analytics | SassyPack Starter Kit
meta.description: Track user behavior, feature usage, and revenue. Pre-integrated with Google Analytics, Mixpanel, and custom event tracking.

hero.subheading: Understand your users from day one.

problem.heading: The Problem
problem.description: Without analytics, you're flying blind. You need to track signups, feature usage, churn, and revenue. Setting up event tracking and dashboards takes days.

solution.heading: How SassyPack Solves It
points: Google Analytics 4 integration out of the box
Custom event tracking for key actions (signup, upgrade, feature use)
Revenue tracking synced with payment data
User segmentation and cohort analysis
Funnel tracking for conversion optimization
Export data to CSV or API

meta.title: UI Component Library | SassyPack Starter Kit
meta.description: 50+ pre-built React components. Forms, modals, buttons, cards, tables. Accessible, responsive, and customizable with Tailwind CSS.

hero.subheading: 50+ components to build your UI faster.

problem.heading: The Problem
problem.description: Building UI from scratch is slow. Forms, modals, dropdowns, and tables all need accessibility, responsive design, and consistent styling.

solution.heading: How SassyPack Solves It
points: 50+ pre-built React components (buttons, forms, modals, cards)
Fully accessible (WCAG 2.1 AA compliant)
Responsive design out of the box
Dark mode support
Customizable with Tailwind CSS
TypeScript definitions included

meta.title: One-Click Deployment | SassyPack Starter Kit
meta.description: Deploy to Vercel, Netlify, or AWS in minutes. Docker support, CI/CD pipelines, and environment configs included.

hero.subheading: Go from code to production in minutes.

problem.heading: The Problem
problem.description: Deployment is complex. You need environment configs, build scripts, CI/CD pipelines, and hosting setup. First-time deployments often fail.

solution.heading: How SassyPack Solves It
points: One-click Vercel deployment for Next.js
Docker configs for containerized deployment
GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline included
Environment variable management
Database migration scripts
Deployment guides for AWS, DigitalOcean, Heroku
